features.description: User can upload TastyTrade CSV and see positions parsed into a table
User can upload ThinkOrSwim CSV and see positions parsed into a table
Upload validation errors shown clearly (wrong format, missing columns, empty file)
Greek values (delta, theta, vega, gamma) extracted correctly from TastyTrade CSV
Greek values (delta, theta, vega, gamma) extracted correctly from TOS CSV
DTE (days to expiration) calculated for each position from expiration date
Strategy detection: PMCC (long LEAP call + short call) identified from positions
Strategy detection: PMCP (long LEAP put + short put) identified
Strategy detection: 112 structure (PDS + 2 naked puts) identified on futures
Strategy detection: Richman Covered Write (long ITM put LEAP + short call) identified
Strategy detection: Strangle, naked put, jade lizard, spread identified
VIX current value fetched from yfinance and VIX regime displayed (Low/Normal/Elevated/Extreme)
Per-symbol current price fetched from yfinance for all positions
Per-symbol IV rank (IVR) fetched or calculated and displayed
Market data refreshes automatically every 5 minutes during session
Aggregate portfolio Greeks (total delta, theta, vega) displayed with trade plan thresholds
NetLiq shown per account (TastyTrade + TOS) and combined total
Buying power usage shown per account with % of limit and color-coded status
Position table shows all legs grouped by strategy with DTE, P&L, Greeks per position
Positions with DTE < 21 flagged with urgent warning indicator
AI analysis agent triggered automatically after CSV upload completes
Streaming AI response shown in real-time as agent generates analysis
Agent reads trade_plan.md as system context for all analysis
Agent returns structured JSON recommendations with priority, action, symbol, rationale
Agent checks VIX regime before recommending any new aggressive positions
CLOSE recommendations shown with specific rationale (profit target hit, DTE < 21, loss limit)
ROLL recommendations shown with specific strike/expiration targets and credit expectations
HEDGE alerts shown when portfolio delta or vega is out of bounds per trade plan
MONITOR recommendations shown for positions within parameters (no action needed)
Monthly progress toward 3% NetLiq growth target shown ($ and % progress)
Recommendations prioritized by urgency (URGENT > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW)
Weekly theta status shown vs $1,308/day minimum target
Dark theme professional trading UI (similar to TastyTrade/TOS dark mode)
Mobile responsive layout — usable on phone/iPad for checking while traveling
Copy recommendation to clipboard button on each recommendation card
Export full analysis as PDF with positions table + recommendations
Drag-and-drop CSV upload with file type validation and visual feedback
Upload progress and analysis status indicators (uploading → parsing → analyzing → done)
